phoneticUs: ňĆto äm…ôňątiňźo ä; ňĆto äm…ôňątiňźljo ä
examples: The tomatillo is most often cooked, but it can eaten raw, either on its own or added a salad.
The tomatillo is covered with a thin membrane, or calyx, that is a brownish orange color with purple veins.
But the garlicky tomatillo salsa verde, flecked with mint and cilantro, is just right.
